01002.name: Daisy Walker
01002.text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used on [[Tome]] [action] abilities.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, draw 1 card for each [[Tome]] you control.

01031.name: Old Book of Lore
01031.text: [action] Exhaust Old Book of Lore: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches the top 3 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles the remaining cards into his or her deck.

01032.name: Research Librarian
01032.text: [reaction] After Research Librarian enters play: Search your deck for a [[Tome]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

01034.name: Hyperawareness
01034.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

01035.name: Medical Texts
01035.text: [action] Choose an investigator at your location and test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 damage from that investigator. If you fail, deal 1 damage to that investigator.

01036.name: Mind over Matter
01036.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Until the end of the round, you may use your [intellect] in place of your [combat] and [agility].

01061.name: Scrying
01061.text:
Uses (3 charges).
[action] Exhaust Scrying and spend 1 charge: Look at the top 3 cards of any investigator's deck or the encounter deck. Return them to the top of that deck in any order.

01069.name: Blinding Light
01069.text: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. If you succeed, deal 2 damage to the enemy just evaded. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this evasion attempt, lose 1 action this turn and take 1 horror.

01086.name: Knife
01086.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Knife: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01087.name: Flashlight
01087.text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation.

01092.name: Manual Dexterity
01092.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01121a.name: Predator or Prey?
01121a.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

01123.name: Uncovering the Conspiracy
01123.text: [action] The investigators spend 2 clues per investigator, as a group: Draw the top card of the Cultist deck. Objective - Find as many unique [[Cultist]] enemies as you can and add them to the victory display. If there are 6 unique [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, advance. (Note: Not all 6 of them are in the Cultist deck.)

01124.name: Your House
01124.text: Forced - When the Ghoul Priest spawns: Spawn it here instead of at its normal location. [action]: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource. (Limit once per turn.)

01129.name: Miskatonic University
01129.text: [action]: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a [[Tome]] or [[Spell]] card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

01132.name: Easttown
01132.text: While you are in Easttown, reduce the cost of each [[Ally]] asset you play by 2.

01133.name: Graveyard
01133.text: Forced - After you enter the Graveyard: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either take 2 horror or move to Rivertown.

01134.name: Northside
01134.text: [action] Spend 5 resources: Gain 2 clues from the token pool. (Group limit once per game.)

01135.name: Hunting Shadow
01135.text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): Spend 1 clue or take 2 damage.

01173.name: On Wings of Darkness
01173.text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage. Then, disengage with each non-[[Nightgaunt]] enemy engaged with you and move to a [[Central]] location.

50030.name: Rivertown
50030.text: [action] Discard a card with X [willpower] icons: Remove X doom from a [[Cultist]] enemy in play. (Group limit once per game.)

50046.name: Alma Hill
50046.text:
Spawn - Southside.
[action]: Parley. Draw the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Then, add Alma Hill to the victory display.
